name: Cauterized Wounds
additional_info: Does not reduce the blood damage of 'blood drain' effects, such as casting or being hit by Bloodrend Mantras, blood drain potions, and the blood loss Corrupt Resonance downside. Stacks multiplicatively with Alloyblood. The effectiveness of this Talent is reduced if you are using the Curse of the No Life King enchantment.
desc: Blood loss from all sources is lowered.
